why: Ratifies doctrine strategy seq 1 (strategy.317dd8.jsonl), reinforcing already-pending seq 42 (0000-legacy.jsonl). Delivers the referenced-artifact-exists half of seq 42 (extractPathRefs/checkReferencedArtifacts/checkReferencedArtifactsInFiles in check-spec-state.mts, --files mode only per the same false-positive-risk reasoning check-feature.mts's split already established). Found and fixed 2 genuine broken relative-path references in the existing corpus during validation (authoring/backfill-project-spec, authoring/suite-format) — direct proof of value. Wired into spec-gate/SKILL.md (fail-closed pre-filter) and spec-producer-governance/SKILL.md (producer self-run). 4 additive scenarios in spec-gate.feature (stays @frozen, no re-open). Deferred seq 42's use-case-row-has-scenario half — needs a design decision on a row-to-scenario link mechanism, not a mechanical add; flagged to the user, not silently dropped. verify:specs-new (275/275) and verify (13/13) green. Hand-run spec gate, ratified in-session.
